CVE-2023-29407.title: A maliciously-crafted image can cause excessive CPU consumption i ...
CVE-2023-29407.description: A maliciously-crafted image can cause excessive CPU consumption in decoding. A tiled image with a height of 0 and a very large width can cause excessive CPU consumption, despite the image size (width * height) appearing to be zero.

CVE-2023-29408.title: The TIFF decoder does not place a limit on the size of compressed ...
CVE-2023-29408.description: The TIFF decoder does not place a limit on the size of compressed tile data. A maliciously-crafted image can exploit this to cause a small image (both in terms of pixel width/height, and encoded size) to make the decoder decode large amounts of compressed data, consuming excessive memory and CPU.

CVE-2024-24792.title: Parsing a corrupt or malicious image with invalid color indices c ...
CVE-2024-24792.description: Parsing a corrupt or malicious image with invalid color indices can cause a panic.

CVE-2026-33809.title: A maliciously crafted TIFF file can cause image decoding to attem ...
CVE-2026-33809.description: A maliciously crafted TIFF file can cause image decoding to attempt to allocate up 4GiB of memory, causing either excessive resource consumption or an out-of-memory error.

CVE-2026-33812.title: Parsing a malicious font file can cause excessive memory allocati ...
CVE-2026-33812.description: Parsing a malicious font file can cause excessive memory allocation.

CVE-2026-33813.title: Parsing a WEBP image with an invalid, large size panics on 32-bit ...
CVE-2026-33813.description: Parsing a WEBP image with an invalid, large size panics on 32-bit platforms.

CVE-2026-42500.title: Decoding a paletted BMP file with an out-of-range palette index r ...
CVE-2026-42500.description: Decoding a paletted BMP file with an out-of-range palette index results in a panic when accessing pixels in the invalid image.

CVE-2026-46599.title: The TIFF decoder does not place a limit on the size of PackBits-c ...
CVE-2026-46599.description: The TIFF decoder does not place a limit on the size of PackBits-compressed data. A maliciously-crafted image can exploit this to cause a small image (both in terms of pixel width/height and encoded size) to make the decoder decode large amounts of compressed data.

CVE-2026-46601.title: The webp decoder can panic when processing a VP8 chunk with dimen ...
CVE-2026-46601.description: The webp decoder can panic when processing a VP8 chunk with dimensions that do not match the canvas size.

CVE-2026-46602.title: The TIFF decoder does not set a limit on the size of tiles in til ...
CVE-2026-46602.description: The TIFF decoder does not set a limit on the size of tiles in tiled images, permitting a malicious or corrupt image containing a very large tile to cause unbounded memory consumption.

CVE-2026-46604.title: The TIFF decoder can panic when decoding an invalid image with an ...
CVE-2026-46604.description: The TIFF decoder can panic when decoding an invalid image with an out-of-bounds strip offset.
